jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Meesho
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Meesho. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Meesho:
Meesho is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Meesho!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
